voice_input_button.style: floating, glassmorphic circle with a subtle glowing tracing beam edge
voice_input_button.animation: pulse gently when inactive, waveform visualizer when active (listening)

dashboard_cards.style: neumorphic/clay crisp mix - flat background matching parent with a 1px border. No heavy drop shadows. Internal padding p-6

transaction_list.style: clean rows, icon on left inside a soft rounded-xl container, amount on right. Date picker above list.
transaction_list.divider: 1px solid border-border (only bottom of each row, last row no border)

jarvis_chat.jarvis_bubble: glassmorphic styling rounded-2xl rounded-tl-sm p-4 text-left border border-border/50
jarvis_chat.embedded_cards: Jarvis can return interactive expense charts/cards inline

animations.page_transition: opacity and slight y-axis translation (fade up)

login_background.description: Abstract dark luxury texture for the Google Login screen background
login_background.overlay: bg-black/60 (dark mode) or bg-white/40 (light mode) gradient overlay

default_avatar.description: Professional headshot for the user profile placeholder

icons.size: w-5 h-5 for inline, w-8 h-8 for the main voice button

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure text contrast over the login background. Use text shadows if necessary. Hover states must have higher contrast than default.

instructions_to_main_agent: This is a React Native Expo hybrid app, but use React Web patterns if running via Next.js for web (the problem statement says hybrid_fullstack). Translate these Tailwind directives appropriately for the platform.
Implement a Dark/Light mode toggle prominently. Default to Dark Mode.
Use Lucide icons for categories (e.g., Utensils for food, Car for transport).
Build the dashboard using a Bento grid style for desktop, stacking elegantly on mobile.
The Jarvis chatbot should feel conversational, answering queries like 'How much did I spend on food this month?' and rendering visual data (mini-charts) inline when appropriate.
Ensure the floating voice button is always accessible and has clear visual feedback when 'listening'.
DO NOT use Inter or standard fonts for headings. Use Outfit (or similar modern geometric) for headings and Work Sans for body.
No teal or purple-blue gradients allowed. Stick to the high-contrast yellow/black/white theme with emerald/red for financial metrics.
